- Would recommend at least one more copy of Tawil to make her a more comfortable DPS. Can pull for another copy or grab the Prototype Horizon (be sure to grab Timeless Loop as well) from the shop before monthly reset to get her to E1
- Looks like you're going for a mono Tawil team in which case with your roster I'd recommend Tawil-Ramona-Ryker-Nautila/Doll

I'm guessing the Prototype Horizons and for dupe advice <:question2:1356053130336272414> 
- If you'd like a slightly better G!Doll can get her E1, if you'd like to clear specific waves in D-Tide can get her to E2 for poison comp
- G!Murphy works completely fine E0 but if you'd like for her to be a strong DPS can get her to E2/3 
- Kath really isn't a character until E3 a lot of her kit is locked behind dupes *but* definitely worth the investment since her E3 is one of the best in return 
- Thais would appreciate E2 for qol and strength
- Pollux next breakpoint is E3 for bigger DPS but compared to G!Murphy and Kath his isn't as strong but if you like Pollux E3 him anyways <:idk:1356084138280489080> 
- Salvador can become a DPS at E2 but compared to the other units menitoned above pretty much lowest priority unless you love him

Hello, I'm currently at arc 2 chap 1 and would like to know what team I could make to clear the story. This is my current team and while it works it's often very close so I'd like to know what I can do to make it smoother, do I just need to level up my characters or is the teamcomp not so good ?
Ok I mean…the first thing you should do is def lvl the skills of your team. That more than anything is probably hats holding you back

I would swap out Kath’s Sig Wod for Alva’s Sig, giving you another “Defense” and making your “Defense” cards give even more shield with “Feast”, combined. If you are running Titan’s and Kath Sig, you are looking more to Burst, hence where “Paradox” might be better then “Feast”. 

Keep running Kath Posse.

Kath turns will always look like:
Kath Posse -> Kath Exalt -> 3 Fiamma Cards, Cycling Fiamma Cards, playing 3 Fiamma Cards -> Hyperflare

Keyflare is CoV related, so upgrading your “Crimsum Embrace” and “Life Drain” Keyflare Stats would help. Aliemus is just bouncing Fiamma around. 

The first fight is always the hardest, but afterwards, gets easier and easier, once you get Kath Perma Exalt-ing every fight, and enough Keyflare to start every fight with Kath Posse. 

A last change you can look into is substituting units for Karen/Clem/Winkle/Tinct, and trying out Mono Kath as well.

If you have additional questions about CoV upgrading(Main Stat per Piece and Substats), ask away~

Regarding next months sediment, who would you use it on if you wanted to improve this team?
